metadata.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: 2. SIMAP: Concepts, Requirements and Use Cases
2. An Architecture for a Network Anomaly Detection Framework
3. An Architecture for YANG-Push to Message Broker Integration
3. A YANG Data Model for Network Incident Management
4. Sharing your incident with China Mobile
4. YANG Message Keys for Message Broker Integration
5. YANG Message Keys for Message Broker Integration - Proof of Concept Hackathon
6. BMP YANG Model for Network Telemetry Messages
8. Knowledge Graph Framework for Network Operations
10. Model for distributed authorization policy sharing
12. Applicability of RFC8795 YANG data model to SIMAP
